title: ctenitis obscura
intro: Ctenitis obscura, also known as the dark tree fern or Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, specifically in China, Japan, and the Korean Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Ctenitis obscura include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against cancer. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
